title: Key Art Pivot
description: A reference-led four-image series that keeps one cast hierarchy and poster grammar intact while changing genre emphasis and campaign mood.
creative_direction: Establish one anchor poster with clear hierarchy, then fan out into three variations that preserve the same cast logic, spatial rhythm, and theatrical sales energy.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01-reference-key-art first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for the remaining series images. Queue may run the dependent images concurrently after the reference is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Key Art Pivot
en.description: A reference-led four-image series that keeps one cast hierarchy and poster grammar intact while changing genre emphasis and campaign mood.

zh-CN.title: 主海报变体
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖同一基准海报的系列图，在保持人物层级与海报语法不变的前提下切换类型与情绪。
